arts.ttl: Arsenal handed unlikely Premier League title boost that will worry Liverpool
arts.sum: As for Liverpool, despite joining the Gunners in the league phase top eight, the title favourites must play three games. Because of how the schedule has fallen, Arsenal will not play for another 10 days following their Carabao Cup semi-final second leg away at Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim invites Man Utd's ex-Arsenal wonderkid to first-team setup amid striking woes
arts.sum: Former Arsenal youngster Chido Obi Martin has been impressing for Manchester United's Under-18 team this season and has recently featured in senior team training sessions

arts.ttl: Rice signs off on UCL with Arsenal passage secure
arts.sum: The mathematics were still causing a few heads to be scratched after Arsenal's 3-0 victory over Dinamo Zagreb on Wednesday, but Declan Rice gave the new Champions League format a thumbs up.

arts.ttl: Arsenal target Benjamin Sesko will NOT leave RB Leipzig this month, claims German side's boss Marco Rose
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: The Gunners are in the market for an attacker and Sesko has been considered, but it has been suggested that a summer move may be more appropriate if an approach is made.

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Arsenal win, Lewis-Skelly knee injury and Havertz perspective
arts.sum: So overall, very happy, because we need to affect the game from those positions and he certainly has a role in doing that. Three goals on the night from Declan Rice, Kai Havertz and Martin Odegaard gave the Gunners the win they needed.

arts.ttl: Rice fires Arsenal into early lead against Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: Declan Rice gives Arsenal an early lead in the Champions League, as he scores within the first two minutes to put them 1-0 up against Dinamo Zagreb.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta happy with Arsenal in ‘really strong position’ in Champions League
arts.sum: The result took Arsenal back up to third in the 36-team table with the top eight assured of avoiding a two-legged knockout clash.

arts.ttl: Myles Lewis-Skelly injury: Arsenal defender set for knee scan as Mikel Arteta faces anxious wait
arts.sum: The teenager is a doubt for the Gunners’ Premier League clash against Wolves this weekend

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes 'struggling' joke as Arsenal's Champions League status not yet confirmed
arts.sum: Arsenal are almost guaranteed a spot in the Champions League round of 16 and a bye from the play-offs but Mikel Arteta joked he was still struggling with the permutations

arts.ttl: ‘He’s been on us’: Declan Rice shares what Mikel Arteta has constantly been telling him to improve recently
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta understandably chose to make a few changes to his Arsenal side for their relatively straight forward tie against Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions...
